summary: Phase 2: Switch embed_corpus.py to write SQLite + Google text-embedding-005

resolution.note: Phase 2 complete. embed_corpus.py now writes directly to SQLite chunk_embeddings (float32 blobs, provider/model tag), supports a 'google' provider wired to text-embedding-005 via GEMINI_API_KEY, and was round-trip verified live against ollama/nomic-embed-text. Phase 3 will flip config/embedding.toml to the google provider and re-embed the full corpus.
